---
title: "Haotian's Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

Welcome. This Quarto blog is set up for posts with dense mathematical notation, numbered equations, theorem-style blocks, and cross references.

Start with the sample post below, then duplicate it for new notes.
